hypothesis: Concrete eBPF Modification:* Inject a hybrid threshold check (`BPF_JMP_IMM`) that, when triggered by low data volatility, redirects execution to a highly unrolled sequence of 8-byte `BPF_LDX_MEM` and `BPF_STX_MEM` instructions. This simulates SIMD block moves within eBPF limits, bypassing standard `bpf_probe_read` helper calls to minimize context-switch latency and maximize memory throughput on pre-fetched cache lines.
